'''Magus''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who worked the blood trade in the years leading up to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. He was hired by the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] many times, often for clandestine and illegal missions.

==Biography==
In [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]], [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]] hired Magus to assassinate twenty leaders at a conference on [[Rondai-2]]. Magus assembled a group of bounty hunters that included [[Raptor (bounty hunter)|Raptor]], [[Pilot (bounty hunter)|Pilot]], [[Lunasa]], as well as the notorious [[Gorm (cyborg)|Gorm the Dissolver]] in order to carry out the mission. However, after a young boy, [[Talesan Fry]], or Taly, discovered their plans, they were forced to hunt him down before he brought the information before the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. A group of pirates captured Taly and returned the boy to Magus. He then set off for Rondai-2 to carry out his mission, bringing Taly along to use as a shield. Unfortunately for Magus, a group of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] composed of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] disrupted the assassination attempt.

After the Jedi killed Raptor and captured Lunasa and Gorm, Magus and Pilot attempted to escape with Talesan. Magus fled the Jedi on an [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]], forcing both Pilot and Talesan to fall off. Pilot fell to his death, but Taly was rescued by Siri Tachi. After having his plans foiled, Magus retaliated by hunting down Taly's parents and murdering them.

Magus then went into hiding, not reappearing for some twenty years, again working for Passel Argente and the Corporate Alliance, now part of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] movement. Argente dispatched him to the neutral world [[Genian]] to recover a top-secret device from [[Helina Dow]]. He retrieved the codebreaker, and shot Helina during his escape. Unknown to Magus, however, the codebreaker he had stolen had been a useless prototype. However, a tracer installed in the real device by Helina allowed the Separatists to track it to [[Azure/Legends|Azure]]. On Azure, Magus joined the Separatist in their attack on a secret [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] base. He attempted to eliminate Taly once and for all, but his ship was disabled by Siri Tachi. During the ensuing struggle, Magus fatally shot Siri, who managed to render him unconscious. Siri died from her wounds, and Magus was taken into Republic custody.

==Appearances==
*[[Secrets of the Jedi (novel)|''Secrets of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
